title: Open Car Girls
titleNative: オープンカー・ガールズ
synopsis: Otome Kito, a new college student, had vague dreams of “wanting to try something new.” Just then, a sleek, eye-catching car zooms past her, a crimson-red roadster! The driver is Yae Zensan, a car-lover. After being swept up by Yae's passionate appeal, Otome ended up purchasing a pure white Copen! With her new convertible, an exciting, vibrant college life is about to begin! (Source: Yanmaga, translated)

title: Countach
synopsis: The day after he finds himself dumped by his girlfriend, Sorayama Shun recieves a letter... from himself? The letter was from Shun 25 years ago for his future self. The letter reminds him of the time when he dreamed of owning a Countach and being a successful professional racer. With loads of luck and his ambition to make his childhood dream come true, he finds himself as a new owner of an LP400 Countach.

title: Koisuru Asteroid
synopsis: Astronomy and geology are fun…! Mira, who promised to “find an asteroid” with the boy she found at the campsite as a child. She tried to join the astronomy club, but from this year the “astronomy club” and the “geology research society” merged into the “earth sciences club”!? Let’s go search for the asteroid that we promised to look for that day. (Source: Manga Time Kirara Carat, translated)

title: Maid-sama!
synopsis: As if being student council president of a predominantly male high school isn’t hard enough, Misaki Ayuzawa has a major secret—she works at a maid café after school! How is she supposed to keep her image of being ultrasmart, strong and overachieving intact once school heartthrob Takumi Usui discovers her double life?! (Source: VIZ Media) Included one-shots: Volume 1 : Toumei na Sekai (A Transparent World) Volume 4 : Tsuide ni 3 Baka mo Maid-sama! (And While We're at It, the Idiot Trio as Maids!) Volume 4 : Soshite Momotaro mo Maid-sama (Peach Boy Is a Maid Too!) Volume 6 : Aoi Haru (Blue Spring) Volume 6 : Fukukaichou wa Ouji-sama!? (The Vice-President Is a Prince?!) Volume 7 : Aoi to to Yukai na Nakama-tachi (Aoi with Fun Friends) Volume 8 : Baka to Furyou to Hero to (An Idiot, a Delinquent and a Hero) Volume 8 : Toaru Asa no Seitokaishitsu (A Particular Morning in the Student Council Office) Volume 11 : Kaichou wa Shisuji-sama! (The President Is a Butler!) title: Petals of Reincarnation
titleNative: リィンカーネーションの花弁
synonyms: มหาศึกวีรชนข้ามภพ
synopsis: Striving for talent, Senji Touya tries everything he can so he can find it. Kendou, dancing, swimming, basketball, soccer, chess,... anything he tries, he fails to exceed it. One day, his classmate, Haito, came to school for once in a long time. Senji refers her as someone who "has it" or someone who has talent. Later on, he found out that she isn't just someone who has talent, but someone who "took" the talent of herself in her past life. And, those who "took" the talent from their past lives, are also known as "Returners"…

However, the seat next to it was a female student full of “suspicious rumors” and takugi (Hakanagi) Kasumi! Michiru tries to keep a distance while wearing a bandage on the eye band, but the two are in a relationship of "compensating" from chance ...!? It's hilarious, but I'm going to do my best! title: Shy
synopsis: Earth was on the brink of a third World War when super-powered individuals came forth from each country around the globe, ending the conflict and ushering in a new era of relative peace. Among those heroes, Japan is represented by a timid young girl known as “Shy.” She may spend more time worrying about her own shortcomings than she does battling villains, but she’ll show the world that despite it all she still has the heart of a hero! (Source: Yen Press) Note: Nominated for the Tsugimanga 2020 Award in the Manga Category.
